mapper.select: SELECT ID, DISPOSAL_NUM, DISPOSAL_TITLE, DISPOSAL_TYPE, DISPOSAL_AMOUNT, CREATED_USER, CREATED_TIME FROM E_MATERIAL_WASTE_DISPOSAL where ID = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT ALL
INTO E_MATERIAL_WASTE_DISPOSAL_SUB ( ID, PARENT_ID, MATERIAL_ID, MATERIAL_NAME, DISPOSAL_AMOUNT, DISPOSAL_QUANTITY ) VALUES ( #{item.id}, #{item.parentId}, #{item.materialId}, #{item.materialName}, #{item.disposalAmount}, #{item.disposalQuantity} )
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
mapper.update: update E_MATERIAL_WASTE_DISPOSAL set DISPOSAL_TITLE = #{disposalTitle}, DISPOSAL_TYPE = #{disposalType}, DISPOSAL_AMOUNT = #{disposalAmount} where ID = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ID, PARENT_ID, MATERIAL_ID, MATERIAL_NAME, DISPOSAL_AMOUNT, DISPOSAL_QUANTITY FROM E_MATERIAL_WASTE_DISPOSAL_SUB WHERE PARENT_ID = #{id}
